title: cineraria pulchra
intro: Cineraria pulchra, also known as the Transvaal cineraria or silver cineraria, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe and protect wounds. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as an antibacterial agent. In herbal preparations, Cineraria pulchra is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are typically used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
